arts.ttl: Man Utd and Liverpool EYE Kvaratskhelia, Arsenal's Isak MOVE, Chelsea Osimhen LATEST: FT Recap
arts.sum: Man Utd and Liverpool EYE Kvaratskhelia, Arsenal's Isak MOVE, Chelsea Osimhen LATEST: FT Recap With the January transfer window well and truly in full swing, major teams have looked to conduct some huge deals as the rumour mill continues to swirl with some blockbuster moves.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Everton star Armando Broja stretchered off after suffering worrying injury
arts.sum: Everton striker Armando Broja suffered a nasty injury in the closing stages of his side's FA Cup third-round tie against League One side Peterborough United on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall sends three-word Chelsea update after Enzo Maresca transfer stance
arts.sum: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall has posted an update amid reports linking him with a move away from Chelsea. Click this link to follow the football.london Chelsea WhatsApp channel, where you'll be kept up to date on the latest Blues news wherever you are.

arts.ttl: Liverpool consider HUGE approach to beat Man Utd and Chelsea to Salah replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool consider HUGE approach to beat Man Utd and Chelsea to Salah replacement However, according to The Athletic, Liverpool are ‘attentive’ to the situation despite having the likes of Cody Gakpo, Luis Diaz and summer signing Federico Chiesa who can all play on the left wing.

arts.ttl: Thiago Silva shows true colours as ex-Chelsea star sends John Terry brilliant message
arts.sum: Silva has already shown his face at Stamford Bridge since leaving Chelsea in the summer, but he could – one day – return to Cobham training ground in a role of some sort. The 40-year-old defender left Chelsea to join Fluminense following the expiration of his contract at Stamford Bridge in the summer.

arts.ttl: PSG ready to deal Chelsea and Liverpool hammer blow over Khvicha Kvaratskhelia transfer
arts.sum: PSG are pushing hard to sign Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia but the Georgian attacker could now become a player of real interest to Premier League clubs as it appears he could now be available this month

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted XI vs Morecambe in FA Cup as Enzo Maresca hands two players their last chance to impress
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca is going to no doubt ring the changes as Chelsea get their FA Cup campaign underway with the visit of Morecambe to Stamford...

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'preparing to receive new bid' for wantaway midfielder from Serie A club
arts.sum: Torino are reportedly preparing a fresh bid for Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei, who has failed to make a Premier League appearance for the Blues this season.

arts.ttl: Kvaratskhelia chase: Liverpool, Chelsea and Man Utd join PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool, Manchester United and Chelsea have joined Paris Saint-Germain in the hunt for Khvicha Kvaratskhelia...

arts.ttl: Chelsea should go all out for PL star Enzo Maresca has signed before after latest development - opinion
arts.sum: A lot of the pieces of the jigsaw are already in place for Enzo Maresca to be a major success at Chelsea, but he may...
